name: Sanei Ltd.
summary: Sanei Ltd. manufactures and markets faucets, and shower and accessory products for buildings in Japan. The company offers water faucet metal fittings, single water faucets, hot/cold water mixer faucets, shower sets, shuts-off valves, connectors, plumbing parts, sanitary parts, ball cocks, drain fixtures, bathroom accessories, sprinklers, metal gas fittings, etc. Its faucets are used in public facilities, such as hotels and inns. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
